description: The domain aoncadis.org now fronts the NSF Arctic Data Center, a repository and catalog for Arctic research data and metadata. It provides public access to datasets and supports data preservation and submission for NSF-funded Arctic research.
summary: aoncadis.org redirects to the NSF Arctic Data Center and exposes a documented DataONE/Metacat REST API endpoint for repository access; no GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surfaced in public docs.

surfaces.name: DataONE REST API (Arctic Data Center Metacat member node)
